# CWE-836: Use of Password Hash Instead of Password for Authentication (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-836-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserAuth struct {
	Username     string
	PasswordHash string
}

// Safe: verifies a plaintext password against the stored bcrypt hash.
func Authenticate(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Username string `json:"username"`
		Password string `json:"password"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var row UserAuth
	if err := db.Where("username = ?", body.Username).First(&row).Error; err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if bcrypt.CompareHashAndPassword([]byte(row.PasswordHash), []byte(body.Password)) != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
